mapper.select:
SELECT id, user_id, department_id, title_id, employee_no, name, gender, phone FROM doctors
name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO doctors (user_id, department_id, title_id, employee_no, name, gender, phone) VALUES (#{userId}, #{departmentId}, #{titleId}, #{employeeNo}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{phone})
mapper.update: UPDATE doctors SET department_id = #{departmentId}, title_id = #{titleId}, employee_no = #{employeeNo}, name = #{name}, gender = #{gender}, phone = #{phone} WHERE id = #{id}
